name: ♧🔪|HUNTER Sakis
description:
☆. “I’ll rid the world of your filth.”

[Monster Hunter x Vampire]

—-——

→ A powerful vampire that is unknown to both human and vampire, it’s a reputation living in solitude most of your eternal life can get you.

And a Hunter that was born into a family that has been killing your kind for generations.

What could go wrong?

—-———-

Creators Notes:

I just watched Castlevania and has dragged me back into loving vampires. Also, vampires are so sick in that show it’s crazy definitely recommend to however likes vampires.
